basic_details.job_title: ISSA Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 25 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Institute for Systems Studies and Analyses (ISSA)
basic_details.short_information: Institute for Systems Studies and Analyses (ISSA) Paid Internship Notification 2026 has been released on 08 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 25 vacancies have been announced through the ISSA Paid Internship Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech OR M.Sc./M.Tech full time course with First Division from recognized Indian University/Institute (Final year Students Only), Good academic record with ≥75% marks or ≥7.5 CGPA on a scale of 10
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech OR M.Sc./M.Tech full time course with First Division from recognized Indian University/Institute (Final year Students Only). Good academic record with ≥75% marks or ≥7.5 CGPA on a scale of 10.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ISSA Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ISSA Paid Internship Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ISSA Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ISSA Paid Internship is 20th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the ISSA Paid Internship?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed a full-time B.E./B.Tech or M.Sc./M.Tech course with First Division from a recognized Indian University/Institute. Final year students are eligible, and a minimum of 75% marks or 7.5 CGPA is required.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Paid Internship at ISSA?
faq.answer: There are a total of 25 vacancies available for the Paid Internship posts at the Institute for Systems Studies and Analyses (ISSA).

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend offered for the ISSA Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Paid Internship at ISSA will receive a stipend of Rs. 5000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for the ISSA Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The application process for the ISSA Paid Internship is through email. Candidates need to send their applications and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the ISSA Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ISSA Paid Internship will be based on Academic Merit. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their academic performance.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the ISSA Paid Internship?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) to apply for the ISSA Paid Internship.

faq.question: Q8. When will the selected students be informed about their selection?
faq.answer: Information regarding the selection of students for the ISSA Paid Internship is expected to be communicated during the 2nd or 3rd week of July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the start date for the ISSA Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The internship is scheduled to commence on 03 August 2026. Candidates should be prepared to join on or around this date.

faq.question: Q10. Where is ISSA located?
faq.answer: The Institute for Systems Studies and Analyses (ISSA) is located in Delhi, with the pincode 110054.
